Selected work

Case studies.

01

Atlas for Men

Growth Marketing Manager, DACH

Owning the DACH market with a €1M+ budget and full-funnel strategy

As the sole growth marketer for the German-speaking market, I had full ownership of paid acquisition: Google Ads (brand and non-brand), Meta Ads, and retargeting, with a seven-figure annual budget. When France's non-brand SEA declined sharply, the DACH market became a flagship proof-of-concept for what structured, psychology-informed creative and channel strategy can achieve.

  • +15.8% DACH orders YoY via SEA Non-Brand, vs. France –47.8% over the same period
  • +32.5% retargeting performance through creative refresh and audience restructuring
  • Meta Ads launch: 1,812 orders in first cycle, 80% from new customers
  • €1M+ budget managed autonomously across full funnel

02

Talentia Software

Demand Generation Manager

Building a B2B demand engine from zero: AARRR framework, HubSpot flows, content that ranks

Talentia had no structured demand generation system. I audited the full funnel using the AARRR framework, implemented ICE scoring for prioritization, and built automated HubSpot nurturing flows. Alongside the infrastructure, I developed content that achieved organic rankings from day one.

  • +5% lead growth QoQ following full-funnel restructure
  • #2 Google ranking for 'EPM Talentia' (blog content)
  • #1 Google ranking for 'CPM IA' (webinar page)
  • AARRR audit + ICE scoring framework deployed across the team
  • HubSpot automation flows built from scratch
  • Salesforce CRM alignment across marketing and sales

Proof: organic Google rankings

#2 · EPM Talentia

#1 · EPM IA (blog)

#1 · CPM IA (webinar)

03

AI & Automation

Freelance · Side Projects

Applying AI and no-code tools to growth experimentation and e-commerce CRO

Beyond agency work, I build systems. An n8n + Claude API pipeline for scalable SEO content generation. Liquid + Cursor-built Shopify widgets for CRO on a sports nutrition e-commerce brand. A structured Notion experiment system for tracking growth tests with ICE/PIE scoring. These projects reflect how I think: automate the repeatable, focus human effort on the strategic.

  • n8n + Claude API: automated SEO content generation pipeline
  • Liquid + Cursor: custom Shopify CRO widgets for e-commerce
  • Notion experiment system: structured growth testing with ICE scoring
  • CRO audits and Google Ads strategy for Footboks (B2B + D2C)

Case Study 04

Trade Fair & Event Experience.

04

Events & Trade Fairs

Germany & France · 2014–2023

Nine years representing major international brands at B2B and B2C trade fairs across Europe

Over nine years, I worked as a professional trade fair and event specialist across Germany and France, representing major international brands at high-profile B2B and B2C events. Responsibilities were consistent across all events: client-facing presentations, stakeholder engagement, on-site team coordination, stand management and full logistics organisation — across multilingual environments and under pressure.

Brands & Events

Brand Event Format
Mercedes-Benz Caravan Salon, Düsseldorf B2C · International
Microsoft Hannover Messe B2B · World's leading industrial tech fair
Meta Devcom, Cologne B2B · Europe's leading game dev conference
Cariad (Volkswagen Group) IAA Mobility, Munich B2B · International motor show
IAB UK Dmexco, Cologne B2B · Europe's leading digital marketing conference

Full Event Organisation: Devcom, Cologne

Beyond brand representation, I took on a broader organisational role for Devcom itself — one of Europe's largest B2B game developer conferences. This went beyond representing a single exhibitor: I coordinated across multiple stakeholders, areas and teams simultaneously.

  • End-to-end logistics coordination across the full event venue including setup, material flows and scheduling
  • On-site team management across multiple event areas and touchpoints
  • Primary point of contact for exhibitors, speakers and professional attendees throughout the event
  • Real-time problem solving in a high-complexity, multilingual, high-visibility environment
  • 9 years of continuous event experience
  • 5+ major international brands represented
  • 2 countries Germany and France
  • 3 languages used on-site (DE, FR, EN)
